title: Chapter 186
content:
Chapter 185

[Effect: Affinity with the male partner +1% for every intercourse

It was pretty disappointing.

Why would I want to increase my affinity with males? One percent once a day, which meant if I have sex with Cassandra for a hundred days straight, my affinity with Lucas will reach 100%?

But then again, why would I want that?

I couldn’t help but admit again how useless this achievement and its effect were.

But, I was quick to change my mind when…

[Affinity with Lucas +1%]

[Lucas affinity: -18%]

[When affinity reaches a certain point, you will obtain a portion of the stats they already have or the stats they gain from leveling up or training]

‘What…?’

Was that the interesting effect the system was talking about? Could this be a blessing instead?

Happiness was…

“Well done, my love. You endured well.” Lucas said to Cassandra, looking at her with a love-filled expression.

The only funny fact was that Cassandra didn’t have a love-filled expression on her face. She had a lust-filled expression on her face.

“I love it… Lucas…”

Haha.

Now I was sure she wasn’t talking about her love for Lucas.

“Lucas, bring Cassandra here. While she rests, I shall accompany Jack. When she has rested enough, we shall both use Jack’s ability to empower ourselves.”

Zara said imposingly, as if she were speaking to someone beneath her. And it wasn’t just because Lucas was a commoner. She didn’t approve of him to her daughter’s husband.
